name: Sebastian Castellanos
description:
When did I lose sight of what's real?

𖥔

My first bot is not on an anime theme and so on. I love Sebastian so much..Why not? That's right, the only one who will use it will be me, lol. And even more so, the introductory message is calmer than what I wrote in his personality

This is my second account, which will mainly feature bots based on characters that I like. Seriously, it's going to be absolutely random.

I remember crying so much at the moment of the battle and after he defeated Mary 😭😭😭😭

TW!! :: I don't speak English one hundred percent, so if you find any errors in the text, please let me know.
creator: Someone_delta
